channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: These men voted for President Trump. They have very different views of how he's doing
item.description: Two Black men from Georgia who voted for President Trump in 2024 have very different views of how the country is doing now, in the first installment of Swing Shift from NPR's Tamara Keith.
item.content:encoded:
Two Black men from Georgia who voted for President Trump in 2024 have very different views of how the country is doing now, in the first installment of Swing Shift from NPR's Tamara Keith.

(Image credit: Illustrations by Tara Anand)
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Steep drop in number of people with Affordable Care Act health coverage, analysis finds
item.description: Enrollment in Healthcare.gov and the other marketplaces is plunging by 5 million, the new paper from KFF finds. Last year, Congress failed to make a deal to keep the coverage more affordable.
item.content:encoded:
Enrollment in Healthcare.gov and the other marketplaces is plunging by 5 million, the new paper from KFF finds. Last year, Congress failed to make a deal to keep the coverage more affordable.

(Image credit: Patrick Sison)
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: In conservative Utah, some communities are ditching fossil fuel power for clean energy
item.description: In conservative Utah, a coalition of cities and towns shows other communities how to bring new renewable energy to the electric grid in a unique way.
item.content:encoded:
In conservative Utah, a coalition of cities and towns shows other communities how to bring new renewable energy to the electric grid in a unique way.

(Image credit: Kim Raff for NPR)
item.dc:creator: David Condos

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: At least three people are dead after two teenagers attacked a mosque in San Diego — Police say the perpetrators then took their own lives. Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, with key races continuing to serve as a test of President Trump's influence on the Republican Party and voters. President Trump drops IRS lawsuit, paving the way for a settlement.
item.content:encoded: At least three people are dead after two teenagers attacked a mosque in San Diego — Police say the perpetrators then took their own lives. Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, with key races continuing to serve as a test of President Trump's influence on the Republican Party and voters. President Trump drops IRS lawsuit, paving the way for a settlement.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Shooting at Islamic Center of San Diego leaves 5 dead
item.description: At least three people are dead after two teenagers attacked a mosque in San Diego. Police say the perpetrators then took their own lives.
item.content:encoded: At least three people are dead after two teenagers attacked a mosque in San Diego. Police say the perpetrators then took their own lives.
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim

item.title: Rep. Scott Peters on Islamic Center of San Diego attack
item.description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Democratic Rep. Scott Peters of California, who represents San Diego neighborhoods near the mosque where three people were killed yesterday.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Democratic Rep. Scott Peters of California, who represents San Diego neighborhoods near the mosque where three people were killed yesterday.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie faces a tough primary challenge
item.description: Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie has been a thorn in the side of President Trump, who is backing Massie's primary challenger, making Tuesday's primary high stakes for both prominent Republicans.
item.content:encoded: Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie has been a thorn in the side of President Trump, who is backing Massie's primary challenger, making Tuesday's primary high stakes for both prominent Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Sylvia Goodman

item.title: With beef prices near record highs, some consumers go for bulk savings
item.description: With grocery store beef prices hovering around record highs, more consumers are choosing to buy a whole or half animal carcass for the bulk savings.
item.content:encoded: With grocery store beef prices hovering around record highs, more consumers are choosing to buy a whole or half animal carcass for the bulk savings.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marks

item.title: One Palestinian man's life of survival
item.description: A 90-year-old Palestinian man in Gaza says his life has never felt safe as he recalls displacements and wars
item.content:encoded: A 90-year-old Palestinian man in Gaza says his life has never felt safe as he recalls displacements and wars
item.dc:creator: Anas Baba

item.title: Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, testing Trump's influence
item.description: Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, with key races continuing to serve as a test of President Trump's influence on the Republican Party and voters.
item.content:encoded: Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, with key races continuing to serve as a test of President Trump's influence on the Republican Party and voters.
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro
